name: Rongeur de Murailles
description: Infecté dont la mâchoire est renforcée par un béton fongique calcifié. Il ronge les obstacles, les murs et les barricades pour ouvrir des brèches à la marée.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark biomechanical horror, wall-chewing fungal creature. Hunched humanoid gnawing on concrete wall, jaw massively reinforced with calcified fungal concrete growth. Teeth replaced by grinding stone-like fungal structures. Dust and debris falling. Fingers clawed into wall surface. Mushroom growths on shoulders for leverage. Green fungal saliva dripping. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed, destruction scene.
